metadata.title: Nailing a fast double kill with clean angles and calm aim in VALORANT
metadata.description:
Watch this quick clip where smooth peeks and steady aim secure two kills fast. The timing and positioning here really made the difference.
What’s your favorite angle for clutch plays?
Share your tips below!

Drop your best clutch moments or favorite angles in the comments!
